scheduler.description: Scheduled task framework for Hired AI system

memory_consolidation.command: openclaw exec --model deepseek-chat --prompt 'Consolidate yesterday\'s memory files. Read memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md from yesterday, extract significant events and insights, update knowledge/ and skills/ directories as appropriate. Archive processed files.'

system_health_check.command: openclaw exec --model gpt-5-nano --prompt 'Perform system health check: 1. Check disk usage (<90%), 2. Check memory usage (<80%), 3. Verify API connectivity, 4. Validate file permissions, 5. Check for error logs. Log results to metrics/health-checks.json'

weekly_status_report.description: Weekly status report every Sunday at midnight
weekly_status_report.command: openclaw exec --model claude-3.5-sonnet --prompt 'Generate weekly status report: 1. System performance metrics, 2. Task completion rates, 3. Memory usage trends, 4. Security audit results, 5. Recommendations for next week. Save to status/weekly-YYYY-MM-DD.md'

backup_verification.command: openclaw exec --model gpt-5-nano --prompt 'Verify backup integrity: 1. Check latest backup exists, 2. Validate file integrity, 3. Test restore capability, 4. Update backup log. Log to metrics/backup-checks.json'

security_audit.command: openclaw exec --model deepseek-chat --prompt 'Perform security audit: 1. Review access logs, 2. Check for unauthorized changes, 3. Verify file integrity, 4. Review permission changes, 5. Update security log. Save to security/audit-YYYY-MM-DD.md'

update_check.description: Check for system updates every 4 hours
update_check.command: openclaw exec --model gpt-5-nano --prompt 'Check for system updates: 1. OpenClaw updates, 2. Skill updates, 3. Security patches, 4. Dependency updates. Log to metrics/update-checks.json'

cache_cleanup.command: openclaw exec --model gpt-5-nano --prompt 'Clean up temporary files: 1. Remove old cache files (>7 days), 2. Clean temp directories, 3. Optimize database if applicable, 4. Log cleanup results'

performance_optimization.command: openclaw exec --model deepseek-chat --prompt 'Perform performance optimization: 1. Analyze system metrics, 2. Identify bottlenecks, 3. Optimize database queries, 4. Clean up unused resources, 5. Update performance log'
